.allow-failure-template.script:
mkdir -p reports
cat > "reports/${CI_JOB_NAME}.meta" <<EOF
job=$CI_JOB_NAME
expected_exit_code=$FAIL_CODE
EOF
exit "$FAIL_CODE"

allow-failure-boolean.script:
mkdir -p reports
cat > "reports/${CI_JOB_NAME}.meta" <<EOF
job=$CI_JOB_NAME
expected_exit_code=$FAIL_CODE
EOF
exit "$FAIL_CODE"

allow-failure-by-exit-code.script:
mkdir -p reports
cat > "reports/${CI_JOB_NAME}.meta" <<EOF
job=$CI_JOB_NAME
expected_exit_code=$FAIL_CODE
EOF
exit "$FAIL_CODE"

not-allowed-by-exit-code.script:
mkdir -p reports
cat > "reports/${CI_JOB_NAME}.meta" <<EOF
job=$CI_JOB_NAME
expected_exit_code=$FAIL_CODE
EOF
exit "$FAIL_CODE"
